title: PM operating tools landscape
comparison_summary: The landscape is split between broad platforms, adjacent execution suites, and in-house status quo workflows; ProductOS should stay focused on the traceable PM operating wedge.

rows.name: Jira Product Discovery + Jira
rows.implication: ProductOS should differentiate above workflow tracking.

rows.name: Productboard
rows.pricing_signal: Mid to high enterprise SaaS pricing
rows.motion: PM team expansion and leadership visibility
weaknesses: Less emphasis on PM operating choreography
rows.implication: ProductOS can win on integrated PM operating system depth.

rows.name: Internal docs and trackers
rows.positioning: No-change PM workflow baseline across existing tools
rows.pricing_signal: Hidden in labor cost rather than explicit software budget
rows.implication: Quantify hidden workflow drag and review-loop cost when comparing against status quo.
